docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHORK, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT ROUF, RAYMOND AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
